name: drop-deploy
description: Instant HTML hosting MCP server — deploy HTML files and ZIP projects, get a live URL immediately. No auth required.

tools.name: deploy_html
tools.description: Deploy an HTML string as a live public website. Returns the live URL.

tools.name: deploy_zip
tools.description: Deploy a multi-file project from a base64-encoded ZIP containing an index.html. Returns the live URL.
